hyperedges.label: App Root Composition Shell (Nav Bar + Intro Animation)

nodes.label: Deploy Angular App to GitHub Pages (Workflow)
nodes.norm_label: deploy angular app to github pages (workflow)

nodes.label: Vienna Spotmap Audit Refactor Program
nodes.rationale: Bring the Angular app to production readiness across correctness, design-system, architecture and polish as a staged, gated program on branch refactor/audit-p0-p3, without changing its matrix/terminal look or animation behavior.

nodes.label: Standalone Components + Signals
nodes.rationale: All components standalone; use input()/output()/signal()/computed() instead of @Input()/@Output()/EventEmitter unless there is a documented reason — modern Angular idioms.

nodes.label: Matrix Aesthetic Preservation
nodes.rationale: Preserve the matrix aesthetic (dark bg, monospace, green-on-black, subtle glow) and all animation logic/timing/durations at every step; the refactor must be behavior-preserving.

nodes.label: Green Gate (build + tests pass per stage)
nodes.rationale: Each stage ends green (ng build + ng test pass) and is a reviewable, revertible checkpoint; a task is committed only when the gate holds, otherwise it stops/holds at the last green point.
nodes.norm_label: green gate (build + tests pass per stage)

nodes.label: Design Token SSOT
nodes.rationale: Encode matrix identity (color/type/space/anim/breakpoints) as CSS vars + a Tailwind theme so a single source of truth exists before any style migration.

nodes.label: Stage 0 — Stabilization (P0)
nodes.rationale: Fix the two memory leaks (resize listener, MutationObserver), guard localStorage against crashes, and repair three broken specs so the suite is fully green — the baseline all later work builds on.

nodes.label: Stage 1 — Platform Upgrade (Angular 18→22 + Tailwind v4)
nodes.rationale: Stepwise ng update 18→19→20→21→22 plus TS bump then Tailwind v4; hold at the last green major if one cannot be made green, Tailwind falls back to 3.4.

nodes.label: Stage 2 — Impeccable Design Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Run /impeccable init through critique, layout, contrast/color, typography, motion and polish to produce PRODUCT.md and a design direction that feeds Stages 3–5 and P3.

nodes.label: Stage 3 — Design Tokens
nodes.rationale: Encode the matrix identity as CSS vars + Tailwind theme — the single source of truth established before any style migration.

nodes.label: Stage 4 — Drop Bootstrap
nodes.rationale: Migrate Bootstrap utilities/grid to Tailwind and remove the dependency + angular.json entry, dropping ~302 kB of CSS and unparseable-selector warnings while keeping layout unchanged.

nodes.label: Stage 5 — Material M3 Terminal Theme
nodes.rationale: Custom green M3 theme with --mat-* token overrides at global scope removes all ::ng-deep/!important and root-causes the color-render bug.

nodes.label: Stage 6 — Architecture / API Modernization (P1)
nodes.rationale: Signals API, reliable ASCII glyph measurement, zone/perf, and router-driven nav — modernizing to current Angular idioms while preserving behavior and timing.

nodes.label: Stage 7 — Cleanup / Dead-code / Docs (P2)
nodes.rationale: Remove dead code, centralize magic numbers, add docs/README, and normalize formatting — pure cleanup with zero behavior change.

nodes.label: Stage 8 — A11y + UX + Content (P3)
nodes.rationale: Accessibility, an opt-in skippable intro, matrix-styled Home/About content and map error states make the CRT experience accessible and less punishing on repeat visits.

nodes.label: Stage 9 — Finalize
nodes.rationale: Retune bundle budgets, lazy-load routes and run a full verify so the branch ends 10/10 green with a clean build.

nodes.label: Stepwise Gated ng update 18→22
nodes.rationale: Upgrade one major at a time (core/cli/cdk/material), letting migration schematics apply; a major is committed only once build succeeds and tests are 15/15 green, otherwise stop and hold at the last green major rather than forcing it.

nodes.label: Tailwind v4 Adoption (v3.4 fallback)
nodes.rationale: Wire Tailwind v4 (@tailwindcss/postcss + @import "tailwindcss") into the Angular esbuild builder, proving the toolchain with a probe utility; fall back to Tailwind 3.4 if the v4 integration cannot build cleanly. No styles are migrated yet.

nodes.label: Bootstrap → Tailwind Utility Migration
nodes.rationale: Like-for-like migration of Bootstrap utility/grid classes in the 4 templates to Tailwind equivalents, then removing the dependency — dropping ~250–300 kB of CSS and the unparseable-selector build warnings while keeping the rendered layout unchanged at every breakpoint.

nodes.label: Value-Based Spacing Scale Mapping
nodes.rationale: Bootstrap's p/m scale (0,.25,.5,1,1.5,3rem) and Tailwind's (n×0.25rem) differ, so classes must be mapped by rem VALUE not by number (BS *-3=1rem → Tailwind 4, BS *-4=1.5rem → 6, BS *-5=3rem → 12); grid col-* map to width fractions with no gutter added since the templates have no .row.

nodes.label: Custom Green Terminal M3 Theme
nodes.rationale: Replace the stock azure-blue prebuilt theme with a custom M3 theme (green primary, dark scheme, IBM Plex Mono typography, density 0) authored in theme.scss and wired via angular.json, so the terminal look is driven by --mat-* system tokens instead of overrides.

nodes.label: No-White Rule
nodes.rationale: No white or near-white on any controlled surface (including the Material select dropdown panel/overlay and the map iframe) — surfaces render on dark --color-surface with phosphor text to keep the CRT/matrix identity intact.

nodes.label: Remove ::ng-deep/!important via M3 Tokens
nodes.rationale: With the M3 theme doing the heavy lifting, delete the ::ng-deep .mat-mdc-* + !important blocks in map.component.css and re-express the terminal touches via --mat-* system-variable overrides plus minimal GLOBAL rules (the select panel is a CDK overlay outside the component DOM); target 0 ::ng-deep and near-zero !important.

nodes.label: SIGNAL LOST Map Error/Timeout State
nodes.rationale: Back the iframe with near-black --color-surface so a blank/slow/failed embed never flashes white, and add a signal-driven error/timeout state (~15s) showing '> SIGNAL LOST // MAP UNREACHABLE' with a retry affordance and the iframe title for a11y.

nodes.label: Monochrome Terminal Nav Glyphs
nodes.rationale: Replace the color emoji nav icons (home/map/about) with monochrome terminal glyphs (green-stroke inline SVG or ASCII marks) that inherit currentColor/phosphor glow; glyphs aria-hidden, label text retained.

nodes.label: OnPush + Signals, Keep Zone.js
nodes.rationale: Recorded user decision: adopt ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush across all 10 components with signal-driven state but keep Zone.js (NOT zoneless) — a low-risk migration since state is already signal-driven; any imperatively-mutated binding is converted to a signal to stay live under OnPush.

nodes.label: @for Control Flow Migration
nodes.rationale: Migrate *ngFor to the new @for control flow with correct track expressions (loading-bar matrix loops MUST track $index to avoid NG0955 duplicate-key; map city select tracks entry.key / city.city), rendered output identical.

nodes.label: Signal input()/output() API
nodes.rationale: Convert ascii-animation-text @Input() messages / @Output() animationFinished to signal input<string[]>() and output<void>() (binds identically, so no template change), aligning with the standalone+signals constraint.

nodes.label: Reliable ASCII Glyph Measurement
nodes.rationale: Measure the real rendered advance of --font-mono (canvas measureText or a hidden measuring element), recompute on resize, and guard against zero/NaN measurement so the ASCII grid stays aligned in IBM Plex Mono without changing animation cadence; also fixes the global-querySelector scoping bug.

nodes.label: Router-Driven Navigation
nodes.rationale: Fix the unawaited this.router.navigate([''] ) in AppComponent.ngOnInit (masked today by the wildcard **→home route); make the intro→content flow explicit/awaited and router-driven with the nav-bar's RouterLink, keeping the default landing behavior identical.

nodes.label: Dead Code + CSS/Token Cleanup
nodes.rationale: Remove 5 unused imports (clears all NG8113 warnings), dead fields (mapsLink/headerText), an unused route import, vestigial @for wrapper markup, a never-applied .map-frame.visible rule, redundant CSS token fallbacks, and the dead lite-server dependency — each verified genuinely unused before removal.

nodes.label: Prettier + Format Pass
nodes.rationale: Recorded user decision: add Prettier (new devDependency) + a .prettierrc mirroring .editorconfig + a format script, run LAST to normalize the mixed 2-/4-space indentation the schematics introduced; verify the diff is whitespace-only and add a .prettierignore if Prettier mangles the ASCII art / matrix templates.

nodes.label: Skip Folder Restructure (decision)
nodes.rationale: Recorded user decision to SKIP the planned modules/→features/+shared/ folder restructure because the structure is already sensible and the churn is not worth it.

nodes.label: prefers-reduced-motion Fallbacks
nodes.rationale: Every CRT motion (glitch-text scramble, loading-bar matrix, nav-bar glow, keyframes) gets a reduced-motion fallback — static end-state or crossfade under matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)') — without changing behavior for users without the preference, so accessibility is preserved.

nodes.label: Once-Per-Session Skippable Intro
nodes.rationale: Recorded user decision: play the intro once per browser session (sessionStorage introSeen flag, guarded for private mode), skip straight to the map on later loads; skippable any time via click/tap/Esc with an accessible [ SKIP ] affordance; reduced-motion shows the end-state instantly — less punishing on repeat visits.

nodes.label: Font Ready Re-Measure
nodes.rationale: Deferred from Stage 7: add document.fonts.ready.then(() => updateFontSize()) in ascii-animation-text so the first glyph measurement isn't taken on the fallback font before IBM Plex Mono loads; guarded for environments without document.fonts.

nodes.label: Monochrome Country Codes in City Select
nodes.rationale: Recorded user decision: replace the full-color flag emoji in the mat-select value and optgroup labels with monochrome 2-letter ISO country codes in phosphor green (group header uppercased country name, trigger 'city · AT'); no color emoji on the surface.
nodes.norm_label: monochrome country codes in city select

nodes.label: Home + About Terminal Content
nodes.rationale: Populate the empty pages in the design voice (raw/DIY, cryptic-insider, sarcastic-but-caring): Home = short manifesto + amber care-channel (RESPECT THE LOCALS / TAKE CARE OF PEDESTRIANS, amber ≤10%) + [ ENTER THE MAP ] route; About = how-to + time-travel ethos + credits + skate-at-your-own-risk disclaimer. Drafted for user review.

nodes.label: Accessibility (a11y) Audit
nodes.rationale: Ensure the mat-select has an accessible label, trigger/options stay keyboard-navigable, map state changes are announced (role=alert on error, aria-live=polite on loading), and the iframe has a title — plus aria-hidden decorative <pre>, aria-current and focus states across the app.

nodes.label: Terminal / Phosphor CRT Retro Aesthetic Pattern
nodes.norm_label: terminal / phosphor crt retro aesthetic pattern
